title: Clients config
description: Maps a logical client name to the OAuth client_ids that should be granted the listed scopes. Consumed by src/lib/clients/load.js to gate PII unmasking.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON Schema. Used by editors for validation; stripped at load time.

client_ids.description: OAuth client_ids that should be granted the listed scopes.

scopes.description: Scopes granted to each client_id (e.g. "pii" to unmask PII fields).
